title: Loki’s Chains and the Island’s Fear
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Scopper Gaban, Unknown person #5, King Harald, Unknown person #6, Loki as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guwa- AHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their wounds come with corres- ponding "Pain"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you keep throwing a barrage of attacks at them, you can even...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Drive them into a state of Incapaci- tattoo.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who can coat their attacks with "conqueror's haki"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: are these guys' weak- nesses!!!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: GABAN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So you're going to oppose me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you think we'd let someone like you, who lost all reason, do whatever he wants?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaban-san, why do you know the weakness of the "knights of God"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because in the past, they came to take you back more than once...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There should be a red-haired child in your care!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no mistaking it, he's our captain's son...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hand him over!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, that guy sommers... he did say something like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, that takes me back... a tale from the past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I was surprised to find out that there's a combat force in the Holy Land. I thought all celestial dragons were useless pieces of junk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in this world, they rarely ever come down. They really believe themselves to be "gods."

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Just thinking about it gives me chills...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That could've been my whole life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's what you call...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "Fate"!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Gaban-san, I want to save Harald!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it was you who taught me the doom that comes with becoming one of the "knights of God"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like the only hope for now is loki...

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
